steps.title: Interpret the y-intercept
steps.content: The $y$-intercept occurs when $x=0$. Here, $x$ is the number of months since the tablet was purchased, so $x=0$ means the purchase date.

steps.title: Read the initial value
steps.content: The graph's $y$-intercept is $225$, so the estimated value at the time of purchase was $225$ dollars. The answer is A.
